query: I need to build a user authentication feature for my Next.js app, can you help me plan it out step by step with specs and tasks?
create a new feature for the onboarding flow with proper specs and requirements
break this feature into tasks so I can implement them one by one with proper dependencies
I have a spec.md ready, create the technical plan for it with architecture decisions
implement task T003 from my tasks.md, it's the auth middleware
validate my implementation against the acceptance criteria in the spec
modify the existing search feature to support fuzzy matching
archive the authentication feature, it's done and validated
I want to plan this feature properly before coding, can you create a spec first?
initialize a new feature for payment processing in my existing e-commerce app
write a PRD for my new SaaS product with market analysis and user journeys
review my code changes and check for security issues before I push
debug why the login form is not submitting, it works locally but not in production
create a landing page design from this screenshot I have of a competitor
commit these changes with a proper conventional commit message
write unit tests for the UserService class using vitest
create an RFC document for migrating our database from Postgres to CockroachDB
report a bug I found in the checkout flow where prices show as negative
refactor this function to use async/await instead of callbacks
set up my Tailwind CSS config with custom design tokens and a component library
map my codebase so we understand the architecture and conventions
initialize project and generate an AGENTS.md
